creator: pfg@FreeBSD.org
text:
(In reply to alex.ribper from comment #4)
Hmm ...

Now that I think about it, I have seen similar errors on other ports that were solved by removing older versions of GCC. The new cgx port shouldn't be using GCC at all so your error message simply makes no sense.

This said, I can't really help you since hardenedBSD is something I wouldn't trust for anything serious. We don't really support anything beyond FreeBSD.
